label: Schwaan_1_Stroma_Schwan_myelinating
evidence: The label uses 'Schwaan' as an internal cluster name variant for 'Schwann', distinguished as myelinating in cluster annotation. In the atlas figures (notably Extended Data Fig. 7b, c) and corresponding supplementary cluster annotation tables, the category 'Stroma_Schwan_myelinating' is mapped directly to 'Schwann cell (myelinating)', with 'Stroma' indicating mesenchymal/non-immune cell and 'Schwan_myelinating' specifying the myelinating subtype. The context is human skin in the adult (and prenatal) datasets compared (see main text: 'the SkO model closely recapitulated in vivo skin epidermal and dermal cell types').
